CustomField.description: A formula field that generates a dynamic hyperlink to the Knowledge Article record. This is specifically designed for use on Approval Request page layouts to allow approvers to quickly navigate to the full article content with a single click.
CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_580, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_580)) & Id, "View Knowledge Article", "_self" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Click this link to open the Knowledge Article record in a new tab for review before approving or rejecting.
CustomField.label: View Article
